# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_group (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `groupid` (String) The group name.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Specify the description for the group. Parameter is ignored when group already exists or `state=absent`.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the group.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) A short message on what the module did.
